channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Google is working on a new AI chip designed to make Gemini more efficient
item.description: Alphabet, Google's parent company, is reportedly working on a new chip designed to make its Gemini models run much more efficiently.

item.title: El peronismo se fragmenta: ¿quién paga el costo fiscal de la interna?
item.description: Publicado originalmente en Justicia Liberal. El hecho y su lectura económica La reconfiguración de lealtades internas en el bloque peronista del Congreso que reporta LA17 podría leerse como un...

item.title: VernLLM - lightweight resilience layer for OpenAI SDK
item.description: Introducing vernLLM: A Resilience Layer for LLM Applications Building production-ready LLM applications is not just about sending prompts and receiving responses. Real-world AI systems need to...

item.title: HollowGraph Malware Uses Microsoft 365 Calendar Events as Dead-Drop C2 Channel
item.description: What Happened On July 20, 2026, cybersecurity firm Group-IB disclosed a new espionage implant dubbed HollowGraph that hijacks compromised Microsoft 365 mailboxes to run a command-and-control (C2)...

item.title: How to Use React Native Libraries in Your Vega App
item.description: Vega is Amazon's Linux-based operating system for Fire TV. It uses a fork of React Native (React Native for Vega), so not all RN libraries work out of the box. That means if you are porting your...

item.title: RubyConf Austria 2026 Talk Video: Frontend Ruby on Rails with Glimmer DSL for Web — Andy Maleh

item.title: Turn DEV.to Into an AI Tool: Build Your Own MCP Server
item.description: What if your AI assistant could list your DEV Community posts, inspect an article, and prepare a new draft without you copying content between browser tabs? That is exactly the kind of workflow...

item.title: SpaceX in your index fund, explained
item.description: Index funds are touted as one of the safest ways to invest. Rather than picking and choosing individual stocks, index funds let you bet on the market as a whole. So what happens when a company...

item.title: One login to rule them all: centralized auth for internal tools with Caddy
item.description: I am lazy. Not in the "I don't want to work" sense1, but in the "I refuse to solve the same problem twice" sense. So when I found myself looking at a growing collection of internal tools (each one...

item.title: MMT Killed My WebSocket Every 5 Minutes — A 6-Character Fix
item.description: By BDubs · AI Rook Trading Engine I run an algorithmic trading engine that depends on a real-time WebSocket feed from MMT (a crypto market data provider). For weeks, my bot kept going dark. No...

item.title: 5 'Cloud-Ghosts': Vulnerabilidades Docker en Serverless HOY
item.description: Descubre las trampas ocultas de Docker que acechan tus funciones serverless y cómo defenderte antes de que sea demasiado tarde. 5 'Cloud-Ghosts': Docker y la Seguridad Serverless HOY Descubre cómo...

item.title: AI’s most important protocol is getting a little bit easier to use
item.description: The Model Context Protocol (MCP) is one of the basic building blocks of AI interoperability, giving AI models a secure way to access external data sources and services. It’s the plumbing that lets...

item.title: Duckmon: The Demo Was Ready, The Game Was Not
item.description: Duckmon: The Demo Was Ready, But the Game Was Not It's been a long time since my last dev.to post, the 12th of February, to be exact. Back then, Duckmon was getting closer and closer to becoming...

item.title: Get Borderlands 3, Risk of Rain 2 and 13 other great PC games for $15
item.description: The aptly-named “2K Megahits 2026 Bundle” from Humble includes 15 Steam games for $15. It’s a smattering of the publisher 2K’s biggest games of the 2010s, including BioShock Infinite, Risk of Rain...

item.title: The PlayStation replica ornament is an homage to a great, yet fragile console
item.description: You probably know the signature PlayStation boot sound. Did you know that it's technically a multi-part chime? There's the synthy section where "Sony Computer Entertainment" shows onscreen with a...

item.title: X relaunches a rebuilt Android app after year-long effort
item.description: X says the rebuilt version of its Android app is now available globally.

item.title: OpenAI is scared of open-weight models. Should the US be?
item.description: Talk of banning Chinese-made open-weight LLMs reveals the challenge of turning AI into a business.

item.title: Ford’s $30,000 electric truck: all the news about the company’s big EV re-do
item.description: The end of the Ford F-150 Lightning was also the start of a new era for the automaker. After failing to capture the market with the electric version of its popular F-Series truck, Ford is going...

item.title: FakeGit Campaign Uses 7,600 GitHub Repositories to Spread SmartLoader Malware
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered nearly 7,600 malicious GitHub repositories, out of which more than 800 pose as artificial intelligence (AI) skills or Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers...

item.title: China’s AI models have Trump’s AI world at war with itself
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Over the weekend, several current and former advisors to...

item.title: Judge pauses Paramount’s attempt to buy Warner Bros. Discovery
item.description: A judge partially granted the request from a dozen state attorneys general to temporarily place the $110 billion merger of Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery on hold, as reported by Variety and...

item.title: Exposed Server Reveals AI-Assisted Phishing Toolkit Behind WebDAV Malware Campaign
item.description: A malware operator left its delivery server wide open, and Rapid7 pulled down the whole toolkit: 1,048 files spanning lure templates, filename-spoofing tests, execution experiments, droppers,...

item.title: LG’s glossy OLED gaming monitor is rare to find under $400
item.description: If you’ve been thinking about upgrading your gaming monitor, LG’s 27-inch 27GX704A-B pairs a glossy WOLED panel with a fast refresh rate, and it’s currently on sale for $379.99 (about $70 off) at...

item.title: LG’s monitors come with an unwanted addition for Windows: McAfee pop-up ads
item.description: A video from Gamers Nexus explains how, after connecting a new LG UltraGear monitor to a PC running Windows 11 for the first time, Windows Update is silently installing LG driver updates and the...

item.title: Adobe’s ‘natural look’ camera app embraces generative AI
item.description: Adobe's experimental camera app has taken an unexpected turn. After Project Indigo was launched last year to provide a "more natural (SLR-like) look" for iPhone photography, the Indigo camera app...

item.title: Introducing Cosmos 3 Edge
Adobe camera app’s new feature will critique your photos using AI
item.description: Adobe's Project Indigo can now remove all kinds of backgrounds from photos you snap using the app.

item.title: YouTube clarifies policies around AI slop and upsetting videos
item.description: YouTube has updated its monetization policies to more clearly define the kinds of AI-generated and low-quality videos that can’t earn ad revenue.

item.title: Dr. Jill Lepore on why AI backlash is vital for the future
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Harvard professor and New Yorker staff writer Dr. Jill Lepore about her new book, The Rise and Fall of the Artificial State, which comes out on August 25. Jill is one of...

item.title: The AirPods Max 2 are down to their second-best price
item.description: There are a ton of deals available to shop today thanks to Best Buy’s “Black Friday in July” sale lasting all week. The sale typically aligns closely with Prime Day each year, but of course,...
